---
title: "Verification: Fix DB_MIGRATION_WRITE_GENOTYPE_MATRIX Tuple Mismatch"
date: 2026-04-24
categories: [verification]
status: in-progress
branch: "fix/db-tuple"
pr: 0
---

One-line channel fix in `main.nf`: a `.map{}` clause trims the 8-element join result down to the 6 elements declared in `DB_MIGRATION_WRITE_GENOTYPE_MATRIX`'s `input:` block. No R library changes, no schema changes, no module changes — wiring only.

The specific warning suppressed by this fix:

```
WARN: Input tuple does not match tuple declaration in process
`DB_MIGRATION_WRITE_GENOTYPE_MATRIX` -- offending value: [<group>, <maf>, <path>, ...]
```

---

## Summary Checklist

Fill in the **Result** column as you work through each step.

| \# | Step | Environment | Pass criterion | Result |
|-------|-------|-------|-------|-------|
| 0 | `NXF_VER=24.10.5` pinned | local | `nextflow -version` shows 24.10.x | \[ \] |
| 1a | stub-run `test` — no WARN | local | exits 0, no `Input tuple does not match` warning | \[ \] |
| 1b | stub-run `test,docker` | local | exits 0 | \[ \] |
| 1c | stub-run `test_variable` | local | exits 0 | \[ \] |
| 2a | unit tests | local | all pass/skip | \[ \] |
| 3a | full run `test` + integration tests | local | all pass; genotype parquet present | \[ \] |

---

## 0. Prerequisites

```bash
export NXF_VER=24.10.5
nextflow -version   # must show 24.10.x
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Output"}
```text
[paste output here]
```
:::

---

## 1. Stub-runs (local)

Stub-runs exercise channel wiring without computation. The primary signal for this fix is the **absence of the tuple-mismatch WARN** in step 1a output. Steps 1b–1c confirm no regressions in other profiles.

### 1a. Fixed architecture (`test`) — primary wiring check

```bash
export NXF_VER=24.10.5
nextflow run main.nf -profile test -stub-run 2>&1 | tee /tmp/stub-test.log

# Confirm the warning is gone
grep "Input tuple does not match" /tmp/stub-test.log \
  && echo "FAIL: warning still present" \
  || echo "PASS: no tuple-mismatch warning"

# Confirm DB_MIGRATION_WRITE_GENOTYPE_MATRIX ran
grep "DB_MIGRATION_WRITE_GENOTYPE_MATRIX" /tmp/stub-test.log
```

**Pass criterion:** exits 0; `grep` for `Input tuple does not match` returns nothing.

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Output"}
```text
PASS: no tuple-mismatch warning

[f6/cced40] process > DB_MIGRATION_WRITE_GENOTYPE_MATRIX (ce.test.200strains_0.05) [100%] 1 of 1 ✔
[f6/cced40] process > DB_MIGRATION_WRITE_GENOTYPE_MATRIX (ce.test.200strains_0.05)      [100%] 1 of 1 ✔
[f6/cced40] process > DB_MIGRATION_WRITE_GENOTYPE_MATRIX (ce.test.200strains_0.05)      [100%] 1 of 1 ✔
[f6/cced40] process > DB_MIGRATION_WRITE_GENOTYPE_MATRIX (ce.test.200strains_0.05)          [100%] 1 of 1 ✔
[f6/cced40] process > DB_MIGRATION_WRITE_GENOTYPE_MATRIX (ce.test.200strains_0.05)                  [100%] 1 of 1 ✔
[f6/cced40] process > DB_MIGRATION_WRITE_GENOTYPE_MATRIX (ce.test.200strains_0.05)                        [100%] 1 of 1 ✔
[f6/cced40] process > DB_MIGRATION_WRITE_GENOTYPE_MATRIX (ce.test.200strains_0.05)                        [100%] 1 of 1 ✔
[f6/cced40] process > DB_MIGRATION_WRITE_GENOTYPE_MATRIX (ce.test.200strains_0.05)                        [100%] 1 of 1 ✔
[f6/cced40] process > DB_MIGRATION_WRITE_GENOTYPE_MATRIX (ce.test.200strains_0.05)                        [100%] 1 of 1 ✔
```
:::

### 1b. Fixed architecture with Docker (`test,docker`)

```bash
export NXF_VER=24.10.5
nextflow run main.nf -profile test,docker -stub-run
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Output"}
```text
    Pipeline execution summary
    ---------------------------
    Completed at: 2026-04-27T11:58:30.502948-05:00
    Duration    : 25.5s
    Success     : true
    workDir     : /Users/ryanmckeown/Desktop/fix-db-tuple/work
    exit status : 0
    Error report: -
    Git info: null - null [null]

```
:::

### 1c. Variable architecture (`test_variable`)

```bash
export NXF_VER=24.10.5
nextflow run main.nf -profile test_variable -stub-run
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Output"}
```text
    Pipeline execution summary
    ---------------------------
    Completed at: 2026-04-27T11:59:50.566918-05:00
    Duration    : 31.3s
    Success     : true
    workDir     : /Users/ryanmckeown/Desktop/fix-db-tuple/work
    exit status : 0
    Error report: -
    Git info: null - null [null]
```
:::

---

## 2. Unit tests

No R library or schema changes were made

---

## 3. Integration test — fixed architecture (`test`)

Runs the full pipeline locally and confirms the genotype matrix Parquet was written to the database. This is the only end-to-end step needed: the fix is isolated to channel wiring upstream of `DB_MIGRATION_WRITE_GENOTYPE_MATRIX`, and the downstream barrier (`ch_marker_barrier`) already gates `WRITE_GWA_TO_DB` on genotype-matrix completion.

```bash
export NXF_VER=24.10.5
bash tests/collect_test_data.sh --profile test
```

After the run completes:

```bash
# Confirm genotype parquet exists in the database
ls tests/integration_data/test/db/markers/genotypes/*_genotypes.parquet
```

Then run the integration test suite:

```bash
TEST_DB_DIR=tests/integration_data/test/db \
TEST_WORK_DIR=tests/integration_data/test/work \
TEST_LEGACY_ASSESSMENT=tests/integration_data/test/simulation_assessment_results.tsv \
TEST_DB_ASSESSMENT=tests/integration_data/test/db_simulation_assessment_results.tsv \
Rscript tests/run_tests.R
```

**Pass criterion:** `*_genotypes.parquet` present in `marker_sets/`; all integration tests pass.

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Output"}
```text
tests/integration_data/test/db/markers/genotypes/8a73ad76f9e47ee088e1_genotypes.parquet

analyze_mapping: ...................................................
assessment_cross_validation: ..........................
cross_validation: ........................................................
cv_pool: SSSSSSSS
db_structure: ..........................................................................................S...

══ Skipped ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
1. traits/causal_genotypes/ directory exists and contains parquet files (test-cv_pool.R:73:3) - Reason: TEST_CV_POOL=true not set — skipping cv_pool integration tests

2. causal genotype parquets have correct schema (test-cv_pool.R:87:3) - Reason: TEST_CV_POOL=true not set — skipping cv_pool integration tests

3. non-marker causal variants appear as FN rows with NA log10p in assessment (test-cv_pool.R:109:3) - Reason: TEST_CV_POOL=true not set — skipping cv_pool integration tests

4. non-marker FN rows have significant=NA (not FALSE) in assessment (test-cv_pool.R:126:3) - Reason: TEST_CV_POOL=true not set — skipping cv_pool integration tests

5. Simulated.QTL.VarExp is populated for non-marker FN rows (test-cv_pool.R:141:3) - Reason: TEST_CV_POOL=true not set — skipping cv_pool integration tests

6. non-marker causal variants appear in causal_variants/ but not in markers DB view (test-cv_pool.R:157:3) - Reason: TEST_CV_POOL=true not set — skipping cv_pool integration tests

7. designate_qtl() classifies non-marker rows correctly by Detected status (test-cv_pool.R:188:3) - Reason: TEST_CV_POOL=true not set — skipping cv_pool integration tests

8. calculate_simrep_performance() runs correctly on cv_pool assessment data (test-cv_pool.R:223:3) - Reason: TEST_CV_POOL=true not set — skipping cv_pool integration tests

9. all expected populations appear in mappings_metadata and are queryable (test-db_structure.R:490:5) - Reason: TEST_EXPECTED_POPULATIONS not set — skipping multi-population assertions

══ DONE ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
```
:::

---

## Notes

<!-- Record any issues, unexpected behavior, or deviations from the standard workflow. -->
